---
title: "Chikv | CellChat circle plots"
author: "Giorgio Gonnella"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: sandstone
params:
  analysis: "1"
  input_step: "07.P.compute_cellchat"
  input_rds: "so_w_cellchat.rds"
  this_step: "07.V.cellchat_results"
  pair: "A_NC_vs_C"
  sfx:  "pfilt"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, echo = FALSE)
withr::with_dir(here::here(), { source("renv/activate.R") })

library(Seurat)
library(CellChat)

analysis_root <- here::here(paste0("analysis-", params$analysis,"/"))
input_var_dir <- paste0(analysis_root, "steps/", params$input_step, "/results/vars/")
if (!dir.exists(input_var_dir))
  stop("Input variable directory does not exist: ", input_var_dir)
this_step_dir <- paste0(analysis_root, "steps/", params$this_step, "/")
if (!dir.exists(this_step_dir))
  stop("Current step directory does not exist: ", this_step_dir)

pair_map <- list(
  A_NC_vs_C    = c("A_NC",  "A_C"),
  `6m_NC_vs_C` = c("6m_NC", "6m_C"),
  NC_A_vs_6m   = c("A_NC",  "6m_NC"),
  C_A_vs_6m    = c("A_C",   "6m_C")
)
if (!params$pair %in% names(pair_map)) stop("Unknown pair: ", params$pair)
if (!params$sfx  %in% c("all", "pfilt")) stop("Unknown sfx: ", params$sfx)

conds  <- pair_map[[params$pair]]
nm1    <- conds[1]; nm2 <- conds[2]
sfx    <- params$sfx
thresh <- if (sfx == "pfilt") 0.05 else 1

plots_outdir <- paste0(this_step_dir, "results/", params$pair, "/", sfx, "/plots/")
dir.create(plots_outdir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

.fig_counter <- 0L
```

```{r load_so}
so <- readRDS(file = paste0(input_var_dir, params$input_rds))
cc <- so@misc$cc[[sfx]]
```

---

Report: **`r params$pair`** — filter: **`r sfx`**

---

```{r circle_render, include=FALSE}
circle_items <- list()
for (nm in c(nm1, nm2)) {
  all_pathways <- cc[[nm]]@netP$pathways
  outdir       <- file.path(plots_outdir, "circle", nm)
  dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  for (pathway in all_pathways) {
    fstem    <- paste0(nm, ".", sfx, ".", gsub(" ", "_", pathway))
    png_path <- file.path(outdir, paste0(fstem, "_circle.png"))
    pdf_path <- file.path(outdir, paste0(fstem, "_circle.pdf"))

    png(png_path, width = 900, height = 900)
    netVisual_aggregate(cc[[nm]], signaling = pathway, layout = "circle", thresh = thresh)
    title(paste0(nm, " (", sfx, "): ", pathway))
    invisible(dev.off())

    pdf(pdf_path, width = 9, height = 9)
    netVisual_aggregate(cc[[nm]], signaling = pathway, layout = "circle", thresh = thresh)
    title(paste0(nm, " (", sfx, "): ", pathway))
    invisible(dev.off())

    circle_items[[length(circle_items) + 1]] <-
      list(label = paste0(nm, ": ", pathway), png = png_path)
  }
}
```

```{r circle_display, results='asis'}
for (item in circle_items) {
  .fig_counter <<- .fig_counter + 1L
  lbl <- paste0(params$pair, ".", sfx, ".Fig", .fig_counter, " \u2014 ", item$label)
  writeLines(c(paste0("### ", lbl), "", paste0("![](", item$png, ")"), ""))
}
```

# Session info

```{r session_info, echo=FALSE}
sessionInfo()
```
